prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-4F3LBRSFBBA-SML-RD-2 Product Type: BICYCLE_LIGHT Brand (from catalog): Universal Safety Existing Title: 7 Function 5 LED Universal Bicycle Safety Flasher Bike Attachment Included Description: Ever find yourself riding your bike at night and worrying about your visibility? This ASR Outdoor 5 LED Safety Flasher will ensure that you'll be seen by other bikers and vehicles.

This flasher features 5 super bright LED bulbs, and has 7 functions: LEDs double blinking, flashing, all on or off when not in use.

Compact and lightweight, these flashers are ideal for joggers, cyclists, skiers, hikers and even kids. Make sure to keep one of these on your bike at all times. Search Terms: LED cyclists hikers flashlight blinker Features: - Compact and Lightweight - Water Resistant - Uses 2AA Batteries (Not Included) - Comes with Arm Band and Bike Attachment - 5 LED === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Safety 5 LED Bicycle Safety Flasher Light

openai.item_name: Universal Safety Red 5 LED Bicycle Safety Flasher

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Lighting Functions, Water Resistant, Compact And Lightweight, Includes Bike Attachment And Arm Band

openai.title_differentiation: 7 Functions, Water Resistant, Compact Lightweight, Arm Band And Bike Attachment, Uses 2AA Batteries
